_doctrine: The micro-lean is a REAL directional call and it was never being graded. Jordan sets daily_call=flat (no conviction) while the system fires long_micro (a genuine read with mechanical confluence behind it). The scoreboard was measuring the call he wasn't making and ignoring the one he was. This is that call's own track record. The question worth asking: is the MECHANICAL read (micro-lean) beating the JUDGMENT read (daily_call)? If it is, that is worth knowing.
